changelog:
🎵 Import Playlists from Spotify & YouTube
• Paste public Spotify or YouTube URLs to import tracks instantly
• Resolves real high-quality album artwork concurrently via Spotify oEmbed API

🎨 UI & Premium Upgrades
• Frameless window design with a sleek custom titlebar layout
• Gorgeous, responsive live animated wallpaper background themes (Aurora Drift, Starry Space, Retro Grid)
• Glassmorphic translucent panel overlays for all sidebars and players

🔧 Stability & Bug Fixes
• Fixed tab navigation crash and dynamic playlist row caching
• Fixed double-escaped newlines in auto-update changelog descriptions
• Installer now runs completely silently and auto-launches the new app when finished!
